model: OpenAI built-in image generation; model identifier not exposed by tool

parameters.identityBoardRelationship: identity-board-v3 was accepted only after two image_gen prop-side corrections; the accepted board physically binds notebook to the character own left and the single souvenir cluster to own right in both front and back views; it remains owner-review pending
parameters.acceptedWorldGeneration: v7 targeted image_gen correction of only the southwest cell from the v6 independently authored true-eight source; v6 itself corrected prop-side placement from the independently authored v4 direction sheet; no offline mirror, flip, rotation, relabel or compositing was used

negativeConstraints: no runtime or offline mirroring, flipping, rotation or direction relabeling
southwest and west look toward canvas left; northeast, east and southeast look toward canvas right; north shows no face
no manor key, scepter, cane, staff, wand, magic, readable text, quest icon, second person or scenery
no labels, arrows, borders, UI, watermark, numbers, ground plane or cast shadow
no cropped subject or cell-edge crossing
no StoneAge source art, character, texture or costume copying

identityBoard.relationship: accepted prop-side-corrected identity canary supplied to accepted world and portrait edits; pending owner review

worldSheet.identityReferenceRole: exact corrected subject identity and physical body-side reference

portraitSheet.identityReferenceRole: exact corrected identity reference; accepted portrait expressions were conformed through a final image_gen edit

observedBackgroundFact: All accepted generated sheets are fully opaque but contain spatially varying near-magenta pixels rather than a mathematically uniform #FF00FF backdrop; deterministic v3.1 classification, reviewed component decisions and archived masks are required.
